<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# List all nodes to find objects I haven't clicked yet
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    # Get center of boundary
    boundary = n['boundary']
    min_r = min(p[0] for p in boundary)
    max_r = max(p[0] for p in boundary)
    min_c = min(p[1] for p in boundary)
    max_c = max(p[1] for p in boundary)
    center_r = (min_r + max_r) // 2
    center_c = (min_c + max_c) // 2
    print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, center=({center_r},{center_c}), boundary={boundary[:3]}..., children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
